# Rip Packs City

## Overview
Rip Packs City (RPC) is a collector intelligence platform for Flow blockchain NFT collectibles. Founded by Trevor Dillon-Bond, an Official Portland Trail Blazers Team Captain on NBA Top Shot.

## Supported Collections

### NBA Top Shot
- Contract: 0x0b2a3299cc857e29 (TopShot)
- Tiers: Common, Fandom, Rare, Legendary, Ultimate
- Features: Wallet analytics, FMV, sniper deals, badge tracker, set completion, pack EV
- Badges: Rookie Year, Top Shot Debut, Rookie Premiere, Rookie of the Year, Rookie Mint, Championship Year, #1 Serial, Jersey Match, Perfect Mint
- Series: Series 1, Series 2, Summer 2021, Series 3, Series 4, Series 2023-24, Series 2024-25, Series 2025-26
- URLs: /nba-top-shot/collection, /nba-top-shot/sniper, /nba-top-shot/packs, /nba-top-shot/badges, /nba-top-shot/sets

### NFL All Day
- Contract: 0xe4cf4bdc1751c65d (AllDay)
- Tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Ultimate
- Features: Wallet analytics, FMV, sniper deals, set completion, pack browser
- URLs: /nfl-all-day/collection, /nfl-all-day/sniper, /nfl-all-day/packs, /nfl-all-day/sets

### LaLiga Golazos
- Contract: 0x87ca73a41bb50ad5 (Golazos)
- Tiers: Common, Fandom, Rare, Legendary
- Features: Wallet analytics, FMV, sniper deals, set completion
- URLs: /laliga-golazos/collection, /laliga-golazos/sniper, /laliga-golazos/sets

### Disney Pinnacle
- Contract: Pinnacle (Flow)
- Tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary
- Features: Wallet analytics, FMV, sniper deals
- Marketplace: disneypinnacle.com (not Flowty)
- URLs: /disney-pinnacle/collection, /disney-pinnacle/sniper

### UFC Strike
- Contract: 0x329feb3ab062d289 (UFC_NFT)
- Tiers: Challenger, Contender, Fandom
- Features: Wallet analytics, FMV, sniper deals
- Note: UFC Strike migrated to Aptos in July 2025; RPC supports the remaining Flow collector base
- URLs: /ufc/collection, /ufc/sniper

## Platform Features
- **FMV Engine (v1.5.1)**: Outlier-filtered weighted average price, recency decay, liquidity rating (0–5), serial multiplier, deal rating (0–1), lowest ask flag. Refreshed every 20 minutes.
- **Sniper Feed**: Real-time listings below FMV from Top Shot marketplace and Flowty. Deduped, sorted by recency.
- **Wallet Analytics**: Any Flow wallet — moment inventory, FMV totals, cost basis, P&L, acquisition history, badge detection.
- **Badge Tracker**: Browse all badge-eligible editions with premiums and FMV context.
- **Set Completion**: Track owned vs needed, bottleneck finder, cheapest completion path.
- **Pack Tools**: Pack browser with EV calculator, tier breakdown, buy/skip signal.
- **AI Concierge**: Claude Sonnet-powered assistant on every page. Understands FMV, deals, badges, edition history, and cost basis.
- **Public Profiles**: Shareable collector profiles with trophy cases and portfolio analytics.

## FMV Methodology
Weighted average price from recent on-chain sales with recency decay. Confidence tiers: HIGH (multiple recent sales), MEDIUM (sparse data), LOW (single sale or stale). Serial premiums applied for #1, jersey match, and perfect mint serials. Badge premiums are market-baked and not applied as multipliers.

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind 4
- Supabase (PostgreSQL) — editions, FMV snapshots, listings cache, wallet cache
- Flow blockchain via FCL — on-chain reads, cart/purchase via Dapper
- Vercel Pro deployment
- Data pipelines via cron-job.org (every 20 minutes)

## URL Structure
- Homepage: /
- About: /about
- Collection pages: /{collection-id}/{page}
- Profiles: /profile/[username]
- API: /api/sniper-feed, /api/wallet-search, /api/edition-history, /api/market-analytics
